title: Fix some code blocks in documentation

comments.body: Sorry for the trailing spaces. Thanks for the suggestion. This is fixed now.
@Honny1 thanks for the help with my first pull request. DOC is now passing. :-D
@rgaiacs I meant the release note in the PR description. I'm sorry, my mistake.
Release note in the PR description fixed. :-D
